Upstream examples synced from bitol-io/open-data-contract-standard @ main
2026-07-02T00:00:00Z

Files:
  - docs/examples/quality/column-accuracy.odcs.yaml
  - docs/examples/quality/column-custom.odcs.yaml
  - docs/examples/quality/column-validity.odcs.yaml

Normalization: version field set to "3.1.0" for odcs conformance tests.

Note: examples that fail odcs Rust validation (e.g. primaryKeyPosition rules stricter
than upstream fixtures) are retained for sync fidelity but skipped in conformance tests.
